monitor.capture_what: return value of the create function (response object containing Set-Cookie header with base64-encoded session)

oracle_check.condition_description: The returned response object contains base64-encoded fragments of known privileged usernames (e.g. admin, root, sysadmin) in its cookie value, confirming that unsanitized user input survived JSON serialization and base64 encoding to reach the Set-Cookie header
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_COOKIE_INJECTION: unsanitized username survived into cookie value — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
